decision_title: Session Management Decision: Standard PostgreSQL Sessions for V1

decision_title: Redis Deferred to V2 (Unless Performance Blocker)

to save budget.

decision_title: Constraint: Do Not Build Custom Authentication
evidence_quotes: We don't want to build it ourselves, right?

decision_title: Authentication Provider Decision: Firebase Authentication for V1
evidence_quotes: for V1, let's just integrate Firebase Authentication.

decision_title: Authentication Methods: Google Sign-in and Email Logins
evidence_quotes: We will configure it to allow Google sign-in and email logins.
Just email, full name, and role.
We don't need address or telephone number for now.

decision_title: Company Name Requirement for User Registration
evidence_quotes: we need to collect company name too!
We are B2B.

decision_title: Confirmation: Company Name Required at Signup
evidence_quotes: Company name is required during signup.
Got it. Email, full name, role, and company name.

evidence_quotes: I was thinking Cloud Run for the FastAPI app
